hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.css) cd /home/user/familyplay && pnpm biome check --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read -r cmd; case "$cmd" in *'git commit'*) cd /home/user/familyplay && pnpm biome check . && pnpm turbo type-check || exit 2;; esac; }
